title: knautia lancifolia
intro: Knautia lancifolia, also known as the saw-toothed foxglove or saw-tooth knautia, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Knautia lancifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support respiratory health. Knautia lancifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can also be used fresh in salads or as a garnish.
